criticalRules: Must be paired with a corresponding event source
Command port outputs event signal (not continuous data)
geometry width=20, height=20 is fixed for event blocks
description: Event input block - receives clock/event signals into the diagram
anomalies: Uses EventInBlock tag instead of BasicBlock
Command port has initialState=-1.0 (event port default)
exprs value '1' is stored as string in ScilabString
name: CLKINV_f
commonUses: Receiving clock signals from external sources
